problem: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties?
mechanism: Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure)
hypothesis: What synthetic material perfectly mimics bone's mechanical and biological properties? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Two-dimensional. Two-dimensional material stacking (van der Waals heterostructure) directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
